subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath sent down the Qur'an in the month of Ramadan, and verily He is the Light of Utterance that hath shone forth from the horizon [3.5s]... ...Cleave ye at all times to the cord of trustworthiness and hold fast the hem of the garment of truthfulness: thus biddeth you He Who is the Truthful, the Trusted One
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الفرقان فی الرمضان و انه هو نور البیان قد اشرق من افق
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions
